pi_items.source: Verified against task.json description field (line 5) and setup_task.sh (line 10 removes file from this path, confirming it's the expected output location)
Verified against task.json description field which specifies exact JSON structure with these three keys
Verified against task.json description field which specifies the feed object structure with these six required fields

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data generated by Python seed script in setup_emoncms.sh. Six feeds are created at environment startup: House Power (W, power tag), Appliances (W, power tag), Solar PV (W, solar tag), House Temperature (degC, temperature tag), Heat Pump Power (W, heat tag), and Test Feed (W, test tag). All feeds use PHPFina engine (engine=5) with 10-second intervals except temperature which uses 60-second interval. Historical data spanning 30 days is generated with realistic curves (power consumption patterns, solar generation curves, temperature variations). The output file path, required JSON keys, and feed object structure requirements are correctly specified.
